description: Senior foreign policy advisory body established in 2006 that reports directly to Iran's Supreme Leader [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei). Provides strategic guidance on foreign policy and international affairs. Headed by former foreign minister [Kamal Kharrazi](/people/kamal-kharrazi) from its founding until his death in April 2026. Members include senior diplomats, military figures, and foreign policy specialists.

sources.title: Iran's chief foreign affairs strategist 'gravely wounded' in US-Israeli attack
